title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bharat Heavy Electricals
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
